name: Baked Apple Rice Pudding
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Pared and cored apples, softened, finely chopped (2 medium)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees F.
2. Mix together the egg substitute, apples, rice, dates, sugar, cinnamon, margarine, and vanilla in a large bowl until well combined.
3. In another bowl, beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the rice mixture until just incorporated.
4. Pour the mixture into a 1 1/2 quart casserole or souffle dish. Sprinkle cinnamon on top.
5. Place the dish in a pan of very hot water (about an inch deep) and bake at 325 F for about 70 minutes, or until set.
6. Serve warm or chilled. Garnish with fresh apple slices dipped in lemon juice if desired.
Nutrient analysis of 1 serving: 1 starch/bread exchange; 1 fruit exchange; 185 Calories; 4 g protein; 6 g fat; 31 g carbohydrates; 42 mg sodium; 0 cholesterol.
